---
title: "Kinetic-scale solar wind current sheets: statistical characteristics and their role in energetic particle transport"
subtitle: Thesis
author: Zijin Zhang
date: last-modified
number-sections: true
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
# citeproc: true
bibliographystyle: apa
---

{{< include _acknowledgments.qmd >}}

{{< include _intro.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include _review_current_sheet.qmd >}}

<!-- {{< include _review_origin.qmd >}} -->

{{< include _review_energetic_particles.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include _juno.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include _psp.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include _scattering.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include _transport.qmd >}}

{{< include _summary.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
